title: IGNITE — On Your Knees (production story excerpt)
description: Scene 4 from a real generated story — explicit dialogue-heavy IGNITE with he commands / you ask attribution style.
gateNote: Real LLM IGNITE prose — he commands / you ask / you breathe attribution style.
text:
The heat of his skin is the first thing you notice—the way it radiates off him when he steps closer, his hands already reaching for the zipper of your dress. The fabric pools at your feet. His eyes darken as he takes you in, and the way he looks at you makes your knees weak.

"On your knees," he commands, voice low. His hands are already working at his belt. "I want to feel your mouth on me."

You sink to your knees in front of him, hands sliding up his thighs. When you free him, the heat of him against your palm makes your breath hitch. When you lean in, tongue swirling around the tip, his groan is all the encouragement you need.

"Like this?" you ask, taking him deeper.

"Fuck—yes," he gasps, grip tightening. "Now ride me. I want to watch you."

His hands are on your waist, lifting you onto the bed, flipping you onto your back. "Turn over," he growls. "I want to see your face when I fuck you."

You roll onto your stomach, breath catching as he grips your hips. "Please," you breathe, looking back at him. "I want you inside me. Now."

He thrusts into you in one smooth motion, filling you completely. His hands hold you in place, moving slow at first, then harder, deeper.

"Harder," you breathe.

"Don't stop," you say.
